response.justification: Candidate is a strong individual contributor with deep technical breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires a people manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years in a technical leadership role focused on developer tools/build systems. The resume shows no people-management experience, no formal tech-lead title, and limited direct work on compilers, build systems, or test automation infrastructure at scale. Mobile-platform ecosystem exposure is also thin.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering experience
Some developer-tooling exposure (MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial/Fluent-Asserts)
Track record of teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing suggests mentoring capability
concerns: No people-management or team-lead experience listed — fails a hard requirement
Core focus is product engineering, not engineering productivity / build systems / test infrastructure
Minimal mobile-platform ecosystem depth despite some iOS/Apple TV work years ago
